query:
SELECT c.name, c.slug, COUNT(e.id) as total_articles, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN e.authorId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_natifs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN e.authorId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as articles_rss
FROM categories c
LEFT JOIN editorials e ON e.categoryId = c.id AND e.isPublished = 1
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.slug
ORDER BY c.id;

LEFT JOIN editorials e ON e.categoryId = c.id AND e.isPublished = 1
